title: CIT for Roguelike Dungeons
description: Custom Item Textures for RLD's Novelty Items
body:
[![Check out the picture Gallery!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5H3YIqHN/images/5cc6a6e9bb2c518cc5fd0a3a90f8b5dbe6dbb656.gif)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rld-cit/gallery)

[![Designed for Roguelike Dungeons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba3e3f06f5031945bef126c9b31580bf8a25c860.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/roguelikedungeons)
[![Requires CIT Resewn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4218ce7399d9320fd6db9d6a328b34e1e8b848d2.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) [![Requires Animatica](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869cb329618064c782cbfd0b6337ed9f8b524b93.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)

Adds custom item textures (animated and emissive) for Novelty Items and custom potions generated by the Roguelike Dungeons mod.  
- 12 Novelty Items: ANIMATED and EMISSIVE (16x16 px).  
- 10 Potion Mixtures: (16x16 px)  

### If you love collecting stuff, this is a MUST HAVE!

I'm pretty sure there are thousands of players that have completely ignored Roguelike dungeons' Novelty Items, simply because they didn't stand out.  
I mean, you open a chest while being attacked by hoardes of zombies and among all items inside, you see a Cookie or a Stick. Would you even consider stopping to look at its tooltip?
Or a random Zombie spawns with Bread in its hand. Would you care to even pick it up?  

When I checked the code, I wondered what was so special about these items, so I researched videos and forums from 11, 12 years ago and discovered how precious those memories were.  

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6bI9nzdh6Uk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>  

That's why I created this Resource pack, so players would feel excited when they find these rare, collectable items. Just like the mod dev imagined.  

### CAUTION!

The Novelty items are not meant to be placed or eaten.  
Remember they are just Vanilla items with custom name, lore and enchantments!  
Therefore, if you place the block ones (Sign, etc.) or eat the food ones, they are gone forever!  
Do not use orally after using rectally.  

-------  

You need Animatica and CIT Resewn for this Resource Pack to work.  


All Novelty items textures and models were designed by [Artsy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/star_artsy/projects)'s blessed hands.  
The Potion Mixtures textures were created by me.  

You are free to include this Resourcepack in your Modpack, as long as it includes a link to this project.  

You are not allowed to repost this Resourcepack or claim it as yours. (These textures cost me actual money, so don't steal them!)
